qa_pair.question: What are the dark-theme and light-theme hex values of the Mzizi mineral whose semantic role is "Growth"?
qa_pair.answer: Malachite: dark #64FFDA, light #004D40 (read from the nyuchi://minerals resource).

qa_pair.question: Which top-level Bundu-ecosystem brand plays the "consumer" pillar role, and what is its primary domain?
How many divisions does the nyuchi brand have, and what are their slugs?
What pixel dimensions does the studio card engine use for the "story" format?
qa_pair.answer: 1080 × 1920 (nyuchi://studio/reference, or the format metadata returned by generate_studio_card with format "story").

qa_pair.question: Which studio layout is the "meet this mineral" educational card, and is it the default layout?
qa_pair.answer: Layout 5 (mineral), and yes — it is the default when no layout is given.

qa_pair.question: Generate a studio card twice with the identical title "Hive", category "gold", and layout 1. Do the two calls return the same seed?
qa_pair.answer: Yes — the seed derives deterministically from title+category+layout, so both calls return the same seed (and identical SVG).

qa_pair.question: Under what conditions do the DARK/LIGHT hex spec labels appear on a layout-5 mineral card by default?
qa_pair.answer: Only when the card is about the mineral itself — no title, or the title equals the mineral's name; generic cards hide them (overridable with showHexes).

qa_pair.question: What tagline does the generate_email_signature output carry for the bundu brand?
qa_pair.answer: "The wilderness holds the hive" (visible in the emitted signature HTML for brand "bundu", and in nyuchi://brands).

qa_pair.question: Which of this server's tools are annotated read-only, and which can publish to the outside world?
qa_pair.answer: generate_email_signature is read-only/closed-world; generate_studio_card, upload_asset, and report_issue are open-world (upload/publish or file issues) but non-destructive.

qa_pair.question: According to the create_social_card prompt, which mineral should a post about community stories use?
qa_pair.answer: Terracotta — the prompt directs picking the mineral whose role matches the topic, and Terracotta's role is Community.
